expo.name: SafeCity+
expo.description: AI-powered emergency response system for safer communities

infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: SafeCity+ needs camera access to capture incident evidence and photos
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: SafeCity+ needs microphone access to record video evidence of incidents
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: SafeCity+ needs your location to report incidents accurately
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: SafeCity+ needs your location for real-time emergency assistance

plugins.cameraPermission: SafeCity+ needs camera access to capture incident evidence.
plugins.microphonePermission: SafeCity+ needs microphone access to record video evidence.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: SafeCity+ needs your location to send emergency services to the right place.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: SafeCity+ needs your location while reporting incidents.

plugins.photosPermission: SafeCity+ needs access to your photos to upload incident evidence.
plugins.cameraPermission: SafeCity+ needs camera access to take photos of incidents.
